inputs.label: Nominal Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Stated annual interest rate before compounding, as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Stated annual interest rate before compounding, as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşik faiz öncesi yıllık nominal faiz oranı, yüzde olarak.

inputs.label: Compounding Periods per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of times interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of times interest is compounded per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yıllık bileşik faiz dönemi sayısı (ör. aylık için 12, üç aylık için 4).

inputs.label: Time Period (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Number of years over which to compute the effective rate. Use 1 for annual effective rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years over which to compute the effective rate. Use 1 for annual effective rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Efektif oranın hesaplanacağı yıl sayısı. Yıllık efektif oran için 1 kullanın.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktının yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
